message.content: =You are a research assistant. Your job is to find real articles with working URLs. Return results in a strict format.

=Research the following topic: {{ $('workflow_trigger').item.json.topic }}.

Domain: {{ $('get_genre_config').first().json.genre_name }}.

Return EXACTLY this format for each source (find 8-12 sources):

---
SOURCE 1:
Title: [article title]
URL: [full https URL]
Author: [author name or publication]
Date: [publication date if available]
Summary: [2-3 sentence summary of the key insight]
---
SOURCE 2:
...

Requirements:
- Every source MUST have a working URL
- Use reputable publications (major news, academic, industry)
- Focus specifically on the topic requested
- Include a mix of recent news, analysis, and expert commentary

assignments.name: prompt

message.content: =You are a world-class newsletter writer. You always embed source links as markdown [Title](url) in your writing. You return only valid JSON, never markdown code fences.

parameters.subject: =Newsletter: {{ $('set_full_newsletter').item.json.subject_line }}
parameters.message:
={{ ($('workflow_trigger').first().json.user_prompt ? '
Command: ' + $('workflow_trigger').first().json.user_prompt + '
' : '') + $('convert_to_html').item.json.data }}
